rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §39.361, which governs student grade report notices regarding campus distinction designations. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 39.361. NOTICE IN STUDENT GRADE REPORT.
_note: Rule text concerns student grade report notices; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No intersection.
